s: In 2007, Edwar Ramirez suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 8.140, WHIP 1.810, SO 31, WAR -0.400.
In 2008, Edwar Ramirez suited up for NYY as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 3.900, WHIP 1.230, SO 63, WAR 0.300.

Changed teams after the previous season (NYY -> OAK).
In 2010, Edwar Ramirez suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.910, WHIP 1.730, SO 10, WAR -0.100. Notable context: Joined OAK.
